zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs於1350年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親William Cunningham Earl of Carrick22歲，母親Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick17歲。他於1400年之前與Margaret Danielston結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯被列為sheriff of kilmaurs。他去世於1424年6月21日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾塔波爾頓享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs于1350年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲William Cunningham Earl of Carrick22岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick17岁。他于1400年之前与Margaret Danielston结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯被列为sheriff of kilmaurs。他去世于1424年6月21日在苏格兰艾斯爾塔波爾頓享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs was born in 1350, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, William Cunningham Earl of Carrick, was 22 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, was 17. He married Margaret Danielston before 1400. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. His occupation is listed as sheriff of kilmaurs in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. He died on 21 June 1424, in Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs est né en 1350, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, William Cunningham Earl of Carrick, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Danielston avant 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of kilmaurs à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1424, à Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs 1350 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cunningham Earl of Carrick 22 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick 17. Er hat vor 1400 Margaret Danielston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of kilmaurs in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Juni 1424 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs è nato il nel 1350 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Cunningham Earl of Carrick, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Danielston prima del 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of kilmaurs nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Morì il 21 giugno 1424, nel Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaursが1350年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父William Cunningham Earl of Carrickは22歳，母Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrickは17歳であった。1400年以前にMargaret Danielstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズでの職業はsheriff of kilmaursと記録されている。彼は1424年6月21日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアターボルトンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs(이)가 1350년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cunningham Earl of Carrick(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1400년 이전 Margaret Danielston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 sheriff of kilmaurs이었다. 그는 1424년 6월 21일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 터아르볼턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs nasceu em 1350, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Cunningham Earl of Carrick, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Danielston antes 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of kilmaurs em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 21 de junho de 1424, em Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs родился в 1350 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Cunningham Earl of Carrick было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Danielston перед 1400 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of kilmaurs в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия. Он умер 21 июня 1424 г. в местности тарболтон, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs nació en 1350, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, William Cunningham Earl of Carrick, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Danielston antes de 1400. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of kilmaurs en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Murió el 21 de junio de 1424, en Tarbolton, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años.
